options.systemMessage:
You are a B2B persona classification specialist.

Your job is to classify professional designations 
into exactly one of these 4 persona buckets:

TECHNICAL:
- Software Engineers, Developers, DevOps, 
  Architects, QA, Data Scientists, IT Managers,
  CTOs, System Admins, Network Engineers

FUNCTIONAL:
- HR, Finance, Operations, Supply Chain,
  Project Managers, Business Analysts,
  Product Managers, CFOs, COOs

SALES:
- Sales Reps, Account Executives, BDRs,
  Sales Managers, VP Sales, Revenue Officers,
  Business Development, Partnerships

LEADERSHIP:
- CEOs, MDs, Presidents, Founders,
  Board Members, Directors (non-dept specific),
  General Managers, C-Suite Executives

Always respond with ONLY raw JSON.
No markdown, no backticks.
Start with { and end with }

parameters.query:
UPDATE persona_contacts
SET persona_bucket = '{{ $json.persona_bucket }}',
    confidence = '{{ $json.confidence }}',
    status = 'processed',
    processed = TRUE
WHERE record_id = '{{ $json.record_id }}';

INSERT INTO persona_log
(record_id, full_name, designation,
 persona_bucket, action, result, message)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.record_id }}',
  '{{ $json.full_name }}',
  '{{ $json.designation }}',
  '{{ $json.persona_bucket }}',
  'classification',
  'success',
  'Confidence: {{ $json.confidence }}'
);
